races.name: Weddings At Western House Novices' Hurdle (Go North Night Nurse Hurdle Series Qualifier) (GBB Race)

quotes: {'date': '2025-12-10', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Paxtons Now Stocking Stihl Equipment Maiden Hurdle (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_11800477', 'course': 'Hexham', 'course_id': 'crs_650', 'distance_f': '20', 'distance_y': '4428', 'quote': "It was a good learning experience for Tashkhan. Brian gave him a great ride and he jumped well while being a bit excited. He travelled nicely and it's good for him to win and get it out of the way. He just never had his ground last year. He needs it heavy, so we thought we'd try him jumping. He's had issues with his joints before but this year he's been grand, so it was the time to do it. He's done a fair bit of schooling and he's always done it well, he'll come on a lot for that. - Brian Ellison, trainer"}

{'date': '2023-10-29', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Prix Royal-Oak (Group 1) (3yo+) (Grande Course) (Turf)', 'race_id': 'rac_11093459', 'course': 'Longchamp', 'course_id': 'crs_5486', 'distance_f': '15.5', 'distance_y': '3410', 'quote': "Maybe if Tashkhan hadn't run in the Cesarewitch he could have been second. He's had all the travelling on top of Newmarket, where he had a hard race, but he's still run his heart out. We went to Chester because of ground, and we went to Newmarket because it went soft. We're governed by the ground and that's why he came here. But saying that, he's picked up over a hundred grand in three races so he hasn't done badly for a horse who cost very little money - Brian Ellison, trainer."}

{'date': '2023-10-14', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Club Godolphin Cesarewitch Handicap (Heritage Handicap)', 'race_id': 'rac_11008946', 'course': 'Newmarket', 'course_id': 'crs_988', 'distance_f': '18', 'distance_y': '3960', 'quote': "Tashkhan has run a massive race under top weight and that 4lb penalty he picked up for winning at Chester has just made the difference. We've kept him off fast ground and he's gone down fighting on a surface he loved - 'Brian Ellison, trainer."}

{'date': '2023-09-30', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Watergate Cup Handicap', 'race_id': 'rac_11031436', 'course': 'Chester', 'course_id': 'crs_338', 'distance_f': '18.5', 'distance_y': '4100', 'quote': "Tashkhan is a star. The rain came and that's all he wanted, fast ground is no good to him. That just shows you how good he is. I know he hasn't won for two years but he's had some hard races. There are three races he could go for. He's in the Cesarewitch, the Long Distance Cup on Champions day and the Royal-Oak and he'll go wherever the ground is right - Brian Ellison, trainer."}

{'date': '2022-10-01', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Qatar Prix du Cadran (Group 1) (4yo+) (New & Grande Course) (Turf)', 'race_id': 'rac_10692461', 'course': 'Longchamp', 'course_id': 'crs_5486', 'distance_f': '20', 'distance_y': '4400', 'quote': "Ben (Robinson) just said that having run four times on fast ground, Tashkan didn't know whether he was just thinking about that (early on). He said once he got his confidence he raced a bit better. But the winner's a machine isn't he? Just a different ballgame. This is just a cheap horse and he never lets me down. We might go to Ascot and if not we'll come back here for the Royal-Oak, I think that will be more likely - Brian Ellison, trainer."}

{'date': '2021-07-03', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'bet365 Handicap', 'race_id': 'rac_10220821', 'course': 'Haydock', 'course_id': 'crs_598', 'distance_f': '14', 'distance_y': '3080', 'quote': "Tashkhan is very exciting and there are lots of options now. The soft ground is key to him, he wants a bit of cut and it really makes a difference. He's entered in the John Smith's Cup but with his three-year-old weight-for-age allowance, he won't get in. There's the Melrose at York and he could run against the older horses. The two-mile races could be an option as he stayed well there-Patrick Boyle, owner"}

{'date': '2021-03-27', 'horse': 'Tashkhan', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23048564', 'race': 'Follow Us On Twitter Handicap', 'race_id': 'rac_10152714', 'course': 'Navan', 'course_id': 'crs_5018', 'distance_f': '10', 'distance_y': '2200', 'quote': 'I would say getting gelded has made a big difference to Tashkan and he definitely has his mind more on the job. You could see that Ross was rowing away on him a long way out but he just kept galloping. Down the line I can see him making into a nice three-year-old hurdler - Emmet Mullins, trainer.'}

quotes: {'date': '2024-02-24', 'horse': 'Netywell', 'horse_id': 'hrs_24028746', 'race': 'Betting.Bet Cheltenham Festival Free Bets Handicap Chase (Go North One Man Series Qualifier)', 'race_id': 'rac_11170692', 'course': 'Newcastle', 'course_id': 'crs_962', 'distance_f': '16.5', 'distance_y': '3595', 'quote': "Netywell is amazing. {'date': '2023-12-23', 'horse': 'Netywell', 'horse_id': 'hrs_24028746', 'race': 'Betfred Hot Shots Handicap Chase', 'race_id': 'rac_11118705', 'course': 'Haydock', 'course_id': 'crs_598', 'distance_f': '16.5', 'distance_y': '3587', 'quote': "Things didn't go quite right for Netywell last time but when he gets heavy ground on a sharp track he has proven he can run to a decent level - Michael Scudamore, assistant trainer."}

{'date': '2025-03-07', 'horse': 'Ballyfort', 'horse_id': 'hrs_30122904', 'race': 'Weatherbys Scientific Handicap Hurdle (Go North Sea Pigeon Series Qualifier)', 'race_id': 'rac_11534926', 'course': 'Ayr', 'course_id': 'crs_78', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3520', 'quote': "I'm really happy with Ballyfort. We've always thought a lot of him - Peter Scudamore, assistant trainer."}

quotes: {'date': '2022-07-31', 'horse': 'Cormier', 'horse_id': 'hrs_15289085', 'race': 'White Horse Kids Eat Free Handicap', 'race_id': 'rac_10608806', 'course': 'Chester', 'course_id': 'crs_338', 'distance_f': '10.5', 'distance_y': '2270', 'quote': "Cormier is tough and consistent and always manages to pull it out of the bag. He stays two miles so I was a bit worried about the trip, but he loved it. They were Brian's [Ellison] orders to bring the horse wide - Harry Russell, jockey."}

{'date': '2022-03-05', 'horse': 'Cormier', 'horse_id': 'hrs_15289085', 'race': 'bet365 Morebattle Hurdle (A Handicap Hurdle) (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_10442822', 'course': 'Kelso', 'course_id': 'crs_702', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3571', 'quote': "Cormier was very keen when we first got him but he's settled now. He's grown up a bit and he's a lot easier at home. Early on Sean said he was off the bit, they were going that quick, then he's come hard on it round the top bend. If anything he got there too early but he tries. Taking the hurdles out didn't bother him because he's won a few on the Flat. Cheltenham will be different but we know he acts round there. Whether he's good enough doesn't matter, he's won a 100,000GBP race and his owner lives just over the road from Cheltenham - Brian Ellison, trainer."}

{'date': '2022-01-29', 'horse': 'Cormier', 'horse_id': 'hrs_15289085', 'race': 'SSS Super Alloys Handicap Hurdle (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_10418421', 'course': 'Cheltenham', 'course_id': 'crs_286', 'distance_f': '17', 'distance_y': '3699', 'quote': "Cormier made one mistake at three out, I know it's on a different course but he did exactly the same thing in the Greatwood. He came back on the bridle fairly quickly after and I was always happy. Every time I asked he was always giving me a bit, he's a nice horse and they'll have plenty of fun seeing where he ends up. It could be here in March (County Hurdle) - Jonny Burke, jockey."}

{'date': '2021-07-09', 'horse': 'Cormier', 'horse_id': 'hrs_15289085', 'race': 'williamhill.com Best Odds Guaranteed Handicap', 'race_id': 'rac_10233652', 'course': 'York', 'course_id': 'crs_2782', 'distance_f': '12', 'distance_y': '2608', 'quote': "Cormier has got very good hurdle form and he's fresh off a run from Pontefract where he won quite easily. My only doubt for today was the sun drying the ground out but his class brought him through it and he got away with it. His owner Dan Gilbert loves dual-purpose horses so I'd say he'll do a bit of both - Ben Robinson, jockey."}

{'date': '2022-02-22', 'horse': 'Irish Blaze', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23281132', 'race': 'P.S. Supplies Doors & Floors Maiden Hurdle', 'race_id': 'rac_10472579', 'course': 'Navan', 'course_id': 'crs_5018', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3470', 'quote': "Irish Blaze did well to win, we think he would prefer better ground. He'll race away for the summer and all he'll do is stay - Gordon Elliott, trainer."}

{'date': '2024-04-12', 'horse': 'El Jefe', 'horse_id': 'hrs_19768658', 'race': "Alder Hey Handicap Hurdle (Conditional Jockeys' And Amateur Riders' Race) (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11221678', 'course': 'Aintree', 'course_id': 'crs_832', 'distance_f': '16.5', 'distance_y': '3623', 'quote': "El Jefe was was 66-1 last night and I couldn't believe the price. That was a class ride, like a professional. I said not to go too early - Andrew Hamilton, trainer."}

{'date': '2023-12-23', 'horse': 'El Jefe', 'horse_id': 'hrs_19768658', 'race': "Betfred Nifty 50 Conditional Jockeys' Handicap Hurdle", 'race_id': 'rac_11118744', 'course': 'Haydock', 'course_id': 'crs_598', 'distance_f': '19', 'distance_y': '4151', 'quote': "El Jefe never lifted the bridle at all last year and I couldn't get to the bottom of it but he's come back this year like a new fella, he loves life. I was glad to see so much rain because he loves the muck and he was getting a lot of weight from the other horses. He never finds a lot, but he will keep galloping. I'm delighted - Andrew Hamilton, trainer."}

{'date': '2026-01-08', 'horse': 'Pour Les Filles', 'horse_id': 'hrs_30123016', 'race': "DragonBet Best Odds Guaranteed UK Racing Novices' Limited Handicap Chase (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11843819', 'course': 'Ffos Las', 'course_id': 'crs_31512', 'distance_f': '19.5', 'distance_y': '4263', 'quote': "We've had Pour Les Filles for about five or six weeks, but everything he has done has really impressed us. He has always looked like a chaser, and proved it there. He'll go further in time. He was novicey over the first few and then he was away ? he didn't put a foot wrong. He had some really good form with Gordon, who did a lovely job with him and that attracted us - Mickey Bowen, trainer."}

{'date': '2022-12-26', 'horse': 'Pour Les Filles', 'horse_id': 'hrs_30123016', 'race': 'Race And Stay At Leopardstown INH Flat Race', 'race_id': 'rac_10781381', 'course': 'Leopardstown', 'course_id': 'crs_4862', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3520', 'quote': "Pour Les Filles is a horse for the future. He probably won't do a whole lot more this season. We might give him a run in a nice hurdles race and then put him away until next season. Davy Russell (who bought him as a three-year-old) has had him before and knows all about him. He's not really a bumper horse and we'll take our time with him. He did well to get back on top because his ground got taken. If he hadn't won he'd have been unlucky - Gordon Elliott, trainer"}

{'date': '2024-12-21', 'horse': 'Classic Maestro', 'horse_id': 'hrs_29523081', 'race': "Betfred 'Classic Bookmaker' Beginners' Chase (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11471330', 'course': 'Haydock', 'course_id': 'crs_598', 'distance_f': '16.5', 'distance_y': '3587', 'quote': "On form, Classic Maestro should have done that. We'll freshen him up for a couple of weeks, but he loves heavy ground and we'll have to make use of that. He should get further and can step up to two and a half miles - Alan O'Keeffe, assistant trainer."}

{'date': '2025-10-16', 'horse': 'Dare To Shout', 'horse_id': 'hrs_29409821', 'race': 'Vesta Wealth Handicap Chase (Challenger Staying Chase Series Qualifier) (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_11744772', 'course': 'Carlisle', 'course_id': 'crs_208', 'distance_f': '24.5', 'distance_y': '5390', 'quote': "Dare To Shout thought he'd won the race after the last, but then they all came to him. {'date': '2024-11-03', 'horse': 'Dare To Shout', 'horse_id': 'hrs_29409821', 'race': "Gordon Richards Novices' Limited Handicap Chase (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11411634', 'course': 'Carlisle', 'course_id': 'crs_208', 'distance_f': '20', 'distance_y': '4390', 'quote': "Dare To Shout is not a big horse but I like the way he jumps as he's neat. {'date': '2023-02-17', 'horse': 'Dare To Shout', 'horse_id': 'hrs_29409821', 'race': "Johnston Smillie Novices' Hurdle (Novices' Championship Hurdle Series Qualifier) (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_10807589', 'course': 'Kelso', 'course_id': 'crs_702', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3571', 'quote': "DARE TO SHOUT is a nice little horse. {'date': '2024-02-27', 'horse': 'Twoshotsoftequila', 'horse_id': 'hrs_23596622', 'race': 'Visit racingtv.com Handicap Chase (Go North Red Rum Series Qualifier)', 'race_id': 'rac_11181079', 'course': 'Catterick', 'course_id': 'crs_260', 'distance_f': '25.5', 'distance_y': '5554', 'quote': "Twoshotsoftequila enjoyed the better ground and he wasn't travelling well in the Great Yorkshire Chase last time when our horses were perhaps not running that well. {'date': '2025-02-14', 'horse': 'Primoz', 'horse_id': 'hrs_34760047', 'race': 'Racing TV Profits Returned To Racing Handicap Chase (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_11520457', 'course': 'Kelso', 'course_id': 'crs_702', 'distance_f': '17', 'distance_y': '3754', 'quote': "Primoz is one of the most talented horses we've dealt with and we've changed his training programme a bit. I don't know where he'll go next but he's a very talented horse if we can get some consistency into him - Lucinda Russell, trainer."}

{'date': '2024-10-16', 'horse': 'Primoz', 'horse_id': 'hrs_34760047', 'race': 'Mary Lofthouse Supporting Spinal Research Handicap Chase', 'race_id': 'rac_11396255', 'course': 'Wetherby', 'course_id': 'crs_2262', 'distance_f': '15', 'distance_y': '3336', 'quote': "I got worried because I'd said Primoz is a lovely horse, he's been a great hurdler and is going to make a better chaser, then the chips are down and he's got to prove it. Pay The Piper is a real decent two-miler and Primoz was pretty good today - Lucinda Russell, trainer."}

{'date': '2024-04-19', 'horse': 'Primoz', 'horse_id': 'hrs_34760047', 'race': 'Remus Uomo Handicap Hurdle', 'race_id': 'rac_11222822', 'course': 'Ayr', 'course_id': 'crs_78', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3520', 'quote': "I'm delighted with Primoz. quotes: {'date': '2025-12-27', 'horse': 'Kalo Athena', 'horse_id': 'hrs_39431448', 'race': "William Hill Daily Bet Boosts Conditional Jockeys' Handicap Hurdle", 'race_id': 'rac_11813841', 'course': 'Wetherby', 'course_id': 'crs_2262', 'distance_f': '24', 'distance_y': '5306', 'quote': "Kalo Athena is a nice mare, we've always thought a bit of her but it's taken a while for the penny to drop. Two miles four was sharp enough for her round Carlisle last time - Jimmy Moffatt, trainer."}

quotes: {'date': '2022-11-13', 'horse': 'Ukantango', 'horse_id': 'hrs_24675203', 'race': "Sky Bet Supreme Trial Novices' Hurdle (Registered As The Sharp Novices' Hurdle) (Grade 2) (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_10710037', 'course': 'Cheltenham', 'course_id': 'crs_286', 'distance_f': '16.5', 'distance_y': '3607', 'quote': "Ukantango ran very well, that was a step up in grade and he ran a funny race really ? {'date': '2023-10-22', 'horse': 'Gifted Angel', 'horse_id': 'hrs_30357572', 'race': 'Trustatrader Apply Today Juvenile Hurdle (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_11046971', 'course': 'Kempton', 'course_id': 'crs_728', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3520', 'quote': "I think jumping takes Gifted Angel's mind off the effort he's having to put in. races.name: Oddschecker Free Bets Novices' Hurdle (Novices' Championship Hurdle Series Qualifier) (GBB) (Div I)
Oddschecker Free Bets Novices' Hurdle (Novices' Championship Hurdle Series Qualifier) (GBB) (Div II)

quotes: {'date': '2025-11-01', 'horse': 'Mount Anglesby', 'horse_id': 'hrs_34598200', 'race': "Grundon Waste Management Conditional Jockeys' Novices' Handicap Hurdle (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11757980', 'course': 'Ascot', 'course_id': 'crs_52', 'distance_f': '19.5', 'distance_y': '4243', 'quote': "I had planned on going down the paint to be honest, but Byzantium was already there. I thought in hindsight Mount Anglesby wants every bit of this trip as we have run him over two and a half miles and three miles in point-to-points. With the ground being on the lively side, I wanted to make use of him and get first run on everyone so being two off the rail probably wasn't a bad thing as I wasn't going to get trapped in. We were all stacked up turning in and it was lucky that I did turn out wider. He got first run on them and he saw it really well, but he is tough - Toby McCain-Mitchell, rider."}

{'date': '2024-02-25', 'horse': 'Kel Du Large', 'horse_id': 'hrs_37702364', 'race': "Daily Racing Specials At PlanetSportBet Junior 'National Hunt' Hurdle (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11170809', 'course': 'Hereford', 'course_id': 'crs_624', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3573', 'quote': "Kel Du Large is from a proper jumping family and he jumps so well - I think we have a chaser of the future. He's quite a quirky horse but he's incredibly professional on the racecourse and David [Noonan, jockey] gave him a spot-on ride. The reason we ran in bumpers wasn't because he couldn't jump, it's because he gets a bit stressed sometimes and I didn't want to overstress him when he raced. I wanted him to get used to the racecourse, which is what he has done, and he's a proper jumper. He'll jump fences in time, which is what we wanted - Jane Williams, trainer."}

{'date': '2024-01-01', 'horse': 'Kel Du Large', 'horse_id': 'hrs_37702364', 'race': 'Family Fun "Junior" National Hunt Flat Race (A Standard Open NH Flat Race) (Listed Race) (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_11131796', 'course': 'Cheltenham', 'course_id': 'crs_286', 'distance_f': '14', 'distance_y': '3069', 'quote': "It has all been quite easy as Kel Du Large has bounced out and made the running and nothing ever got to him. It was a good performance, and he is clearly a nice horse. He went to Exeter as it is the most local track to us, and it was a junior bumper and we thought that was a nice race to run him in to start off with. He surprised us all when he won that day, but after that we had to aim to come here. I'm not sure what we will do. He is only four. Cue Card won the Champion Bumper when he was four, but he was exceptional. At home he has been a touch mentally fragile, but he has come here today and he has been an absolute professional from the moment he has got here. He has not been fazed by the crowd and as soon as he has hit the front he has gone and done it. He is an absolute professional. Come October he will be novice hurdling, but I wouldn't know what will happen now, but it wouldn't be impossible (that he came back for the Champion Bumper) as he is a proper horse - Chester Williams, trainer's assistant."}

{'date': '2023-10-24', 'horse': 'Kel Du Large', 'horse_id': 'hrs_37702364', 'race': 'South West "3 Yrs Old" "Junior" National Hunt Flat Race (Category 1 Elimination) (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_11058710', 'course': 'Exeter', 'course_id': 'crs_364', 'distance_f': '13', 'distance_y': '2898', 'quote': "We like Kel Du Large at home and we've got a great bunch of juvenile hurdlers and three-year-olds so it wasn't the biggest shock, but I'm surprised by how well he pulled away. I'm not sure what we'll do with him next but he won it really well - Jane Williams, trainer."}

{'date': '2023-03-02', 'horse': 'Thankyourluckystar', 'horse_id': 'hrs_25213503', 'race': "Racing To School Conditional Jockeys' Handicap Hurdle", 'race_id': 'rac_10820758', 'course': 'Ludlow', 'course_id': 'crs_884', 'distance_f': '16', 'distance_y': '3469', 'quote': "That was fairly straightforward and it was a lovely ride by Jay [Tidball], he knows the horse very well. It's all coming together for Thankyourluckystar now, he's had a few issues with his feet in the past and he's got his confidence and built from there. It was nice ground there and it helped him, I'd say he'll be better when he goes over fences - Alastair Ralph, trainer."}

{'date': '2023-09-13', 'horse': 'Ocean Conquest', 'horse_id': 'hrs_36035713', 'race': 'Punchestown Maiden', 'race_id': 'rac_11040406', 'course': 'Punchestown', 'course_id': 'crs_5070', 'distance_f': '8', 'distance_y': '1760', 'quote': "Ocean Conquest is a horse we thought a lot of. quotes: {'date': '2024-03-13', 'horse': 'Politacus', 'horse_id': 'hrs_32290958', 'race': "Follow Us On X @betrhino Mares' Handicap Hurdle", 'race_id': 'rac_11194326', 'course': 'Huntingdon', 'course_id': 'crs_676', 'distance_f': '20.5', 'distance_y': '4545', 'quote': "The better ground and first-time tongue-tie have helped Politacus massively here today. {'date': '2023-02-18', 'horse': 'Politacus', 'horse_id': 'hrs_32290958', 'race': "British European Breeders' Fund EBF Mares' Open NH Flat Race (Category 1 Elimination) (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_10807693', 'course': 'Ascot', 'course_id': 'crs_52', 'distance_f': '15.5', 'distance_y': '3452', 'quote': "Politacus is a nice mare and based on that performance today I should've definitely won on her last time. The ground and the track really suited her, she really dug in and did that well - Liam Harrison, jockey."}

{'date': '2025-11-10', 'horse': 'She Is For Me Boys', 'horse_id': 'hrs_39959500', 'race': "Budds & Weatherbys Horseracing Memorabilia Mares' Handicap Chase (Challenger Mares' Qualifier) (GBB)", 'race_id': 'rac_11771032', 'course': 'Kempton', 'course_id': 'crs_728', 'distance_f': '20.5', 'distance_y': '4510', 'quote': "She jumps really well and that's what did it for She Is For Me Boys today. Plenty of mares don't take to chasing, but she certainly has - Jamie Snowden, trainer."}

{'date': '2024-02-27', 'horse': "Bobbi's Beauty", 'horse_id': 'hrs_32682566', 'race': "Belvoir Mares' Handicap Chase", 'race_id': 'rac_11181196', 'course': 'Leicester', 'course_id': 'crs_780', 'distance_f': '20', 'distance_y': '4425', 'quote': "That's our first winner since Pinnacle Park won at the Cheltenham October meeting and this game drives you mad. We've had plenty of seconds and thirds of late, so they've not been running badly and it's nice to get a winner. We weren't going to run Bobbi's Beauty over fences until next season but she'd been schooling well at home - Martin Keighley, trainer."}

races.name: Oddschecker Cheltenham Free Bets Handicap Hurdle (Challenger Stayers Hurdle Series Qualifier)

quotes: {'date': '2025-12-20', 'horse': 'Super Survivor', 'horse_id': 'hrs_24846136', 'race': "Betfred Merry Christmas Handicap Hurdle (Challenger Stayers' Hurdle Series Qualifier)", 'race_id': 'rac_11812645', 'course': 'Haydock', 'course_id': 'crs_598', 'distance_f': '24.5', 'distance_y': '5338', 'quote': "Super Survivor is a lovely horse with good form and it's nice to have him back. He's a happier horse over hurdles - Gavin Sheehan, jockey."}

{'date': '2024-12-29', 'horse': 'Super Survivor', 'horse_id': 'hrs_24846136', 'race': 'Sky Sports Racing Virgin 535 Handicap Hurdle', 'race_id': 'rac_11472669', 'course': 'Doncaster', 'course_id': 'crs_390', 'distance_f': '24.5', 'distance_y': '5364', 'quote': "Super Survivor was one of the favourites for the Welsh National in an absolute bog last year and we lost him, he lost his confidence and he wasn't moving well. It's taken a year to get him back. We'll stay over hurdles for the moment but there should be a nice staying handicap chase in him one day - Jamie Snowden, trainer."}

{'date': '2022-12-27', 'horse': 'Super Survivor', 'horse_id': 'hrs_24846136', 'race': "Coral Best Odds Guaranteed Novices' Handicap Chase (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_10756070', 'course': 'Chepstow', 'course_id': 'crs_312', 'distance_f': '23.5', 'distance_y': '5191', 'quote': "Super Survivor is a very exciting horse who is young and inexperienced. He's gone chasing quite early in his career but we always thought three miles, over a fence and soft ground is when we'd see the best of him. He's one we're looking forward to and maybe we could be back here next year for the big one - Jamie Snowden, trainer."}

{'date': '2024-12-06', 'horse': 'Bill Joyce', 'horse_id': 'hrs_34361572', 'race': "Betfair Winter Novices' Hurdle (Grade 2) (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11456237', 'course': 'Sandown', 'course_id': 'crs_1404', 'distance_f': '20', 'distance_y': '4353', 'quote': "Bill Joyce is a chaser in the making, so anything he does now is just a bonus. We'll enjoy today and just think about what comes next later - AJ O'Neill, joint-trainer."}

{'date': '2024-11-03', 'horse': 'Bill Joyce', 'horse_id': 'hrs_34361572', 'race': "Antonia Reid Memorial Novices' Hurdle (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11411647', 'course': 'Carlisle', 'course_id': 'crs_208', 'distance_f': '20', 'distance_y': '4398', 'quote': "Bill Joyce is a lovely, big horse and we always definitely thought he'd go well for an obstacle. He was probably not really a bumper horse, but he was strong enough to be able to compete last season. We're delighted with the way he started and hopefully he'll continue that way - A J O'Neill, joint-trainer."}

{'date': '2023-08-03', 'horse': 'Mars Harper', 'horse_id': 'hrs_22198981', 'race': 'Guinness Beginners Chase', 'race_id': 'rac_11003967', 'course': 'Galway', 'course_id': 'crs_4758', 'distance_f': '22.5', 'distance_y': '4951', 'quote': "This was probably the race I should have gone for in the first place but Mars Harper came out of Tuesday's race well - Gordon Elliott, trainer."}

{'date': '2021-06-18', 'horse': 'Mars Harper', 'horse_id': 'hrs_22198981', 'race': 'Armatas Fire & Security Ltd Maiden Hurdle', 'race_id': 'rac_10239099', 'course': 'Down Royal', 'course_id': 'crs_4680', 'distance_f': '16.5', 'distance_y': '3620', 'quote': 'Mars Harper did it nicely. He had a good look when he got to the front but he won well. He got a nice run through. He has plenty of ability and I was only keeping him up to it. I still had plenty of horse from the back of the last and was always holding the second - Luke Dempsey, rider.'}

{'date': '2024-03-14', 'horse': 'Kyntara', 'horse_id': 'hrs_22906506', 'race': 'Pertemps Network Final Handicap Hurdle (Premier Handicap) (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_11183549', 'course': 'Cheltenham', 'course_id': 'crs_286', 'distance_f': '24', 'distance_y': '5273', 'quote': "You've got to be disappointed as Kyntara so deserved to win, but we're on the biggest stage and the Brits are a bit behind, so just to be in here is wonderful. All credit to the horse; he just doesn't know how to run a bad race. He's just been a revelation. He came to us under a cloud, and he's just been fantastic - Mel Rowley, trainer."}

{'date': '2023-12-09', 'horse': 'Kyntara', 'horse_id': 'hrs_22906506', 'race': "Boylesports Acca Boost On Horse Racing Novices' Handicap Hurdle (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_11104795', 'course': 'Aintree', 'course_id': 'crs_832', 'distance_f': '24.5', 'distance_y': '5429', 'quote': "Kyntara came to us having lost his way and we took him right back to basics. We thought we might have done that at Lingfield but then you've got to follow that up. We know he goes in the soft, and he seemed to love it - Mel Rowley, trainer."}

runners.owner: Richard Johnson Racing- Oh My Johnny

races.name: Best Cheltenham Odds With Oddschecker Volcano Handicap Chase (GBB Race)

quotes: {'date': '2025-02-20', 'horse': 'Jubilant', 'horse_id': 'hrs_38305603', 'race': 'Visit Huntingdon For Your Next Conference Handicap Hurdle', 'race_id': 'rac_11521445', 'course': 'Huntingdon', 'course_id': 'crs_676', 'distance_f': '25', 'distance_y': '5510', 'quote': "It looked as if Jubilant was always going to win and it's no surprise as we were waiting to run him over this sort of trip. We had to pull him out twice because of soft going, but he handled this ground which had dried out a bit. He could be a good spring horse before going chasing next season - James Owen, trainer."}

{'date': '2022-11-11', 'horse': 'Unanswered Prayers', 'horse_id': 'hrs_21163513', 'race': "SSS Super Alloys Novices' Limited Handicap Chase (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_10709894', 'course': 'Cheltenham', 'course_id': 'crs_286', 'distance_f': '20', 'distance_y': '4444', 'quote': "I loved the way Unanswered Prayers jumped. He's a three-mile chaser in the making and might well need some headgear in time to keep his mind on the job. He'd have loved a bit of company and looked around a bit on the run-in - Chris Gordon, trainer."}

{'date': '2022-03-14', 'horse': 'Unanswered Prayers', 'horse_id': 'hrs_21163513', 'race': 'Betting.Bet "National Hunt" Novices\' Hurdle (GBB Race)', 'race_id': 'rac_10466248', 'course': 'Plumpton', 'course_id': 'crs_1144', 'distance_f': '20.5', 'distance_y': '4514', 'quote': "It was a really game performance from Unanswered Prayers and he's a gorgeous horse. I thought we were going to do it quite well from the second last but the other horse came back to him and it was a real scrap. I think there are two tough novices there. We might have one run with him this season, we'll see what he looks like. Looking forward to going chasing with him next season - Chris Gordon, trainer."}

{'date': '2022-01-08', 'horse': 'Unanswered Prayers', 'horse_id': 'hrs_21163513', 'race': "John Romans Park Homes Novices' Hurdle (GBB Race)", 'race_id': 'rac_10403757', 'course': 'Wincanton', 'course_id': 'crs_2340', 'distance_f': '21.5', 'distance_y': '4702', 'quote': "Tom gave Unanswered Prayers a peach and kept it straightforward. Paul Nicholls' horse [Flemenstide] looks a smashing horse but I thought we might have a little bit more toe when needed. I didn't think he'd go in the ground, I'd say good to soft would be ideal. We took the gamble and it paid off. I'm just trying to keep him all in one piece for chasing next season. I don't want to chuck him in a deep handicap, as the season goes on some of those novices can get a bit weaker so we might look to get a claimer on and go again under a double penalty. We want to choose an easy route this season - Chris Gordon, trainer."}

races.name: Black Pug Open National Hunt Flat Race (Category 1 Elimination) (GBB Race)
